commit.description:
Make PR # references into clickable URL links in create output

- Changed `gh::create_pr` to return `(u64, String)` (PR number + URL) instead
  of just the number, since `gh pr create` already prints the URL.
- Updated `create_pr_for_bookmark` to thread the URL through to both the
  "Created PR #N" and "Stamped PR #N" messages via `style::pr_num()`, which
  already supports rendering terminal hyperlinks when given a URL.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add doc comment to gh::create_pr

PR: #5

Enable ANSI color codes in test snapshots

Added a `set_force_color` function using AtomicBool to override terminal
detection. Test helpers call it before rendering so snapshots include
full ANSI escape sequences (colors, bold, OSC 8 hyperlinks).

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add snapshot testing with insta, dump command, and writer refactor

- Added `insta` dev dependency for snapshot testing.
- Added `Serialize` derives to all jj/gh data types.
- Added `jj-pr dump` command that outputs jj+gh state as JSON for fixtures.
- Refactored `render_show` and `render_log` to accept `&mut impl Write`
  instead of printing directly to stdout.
- Made `CommitId` inner field pub for test construction.
- Initialized node_preds/node_succs for all nodes in build() to prevent
  panics during topo sort.
- Rewrote tests.rs with insta snapshot tests covering: single PR, stacked
  PRs, diamond/ambiguous, merged parent, needs push, base mismatch,
  nothing to sync, and merge child scenarios.
- 18 tests, all passing.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix needs_sync propagation: base mismatch no longer propagates to children

Changed needs_sync from SparseSecondaryMap<NodeKey, ()> to
SparseSecondaryMap<NodeKey, bool>. Value true = propagates to children
(push/rebase), false = local only (base mismatch). Only push and rebase
actions affect descendants; updating a GitHub base branch is a
remote-only metadata change.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add DESIGN_3.md and update README.md to reflect current architecture

DESIGN_3.md documents the v3 architecture: SlotMap-based node DAG,
three-pass build (membership, edges, topo+needs_sync), sync pipeline,
Node enum, and key design decisions.

README.md updated to match: corrected command examples (show vs log),
added sync action ordering, documented ambiguous nodes and sync
indicator, updated key types and project structure, linked to
DESIGN_3.md.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add TODO for multiple PRs sharing the same bookmark

Reverted the panic/priority logic. Left a TODO for handling the case
where multiple PRs (e.g. Open + Closed/Merged) share the same
head_ref_name.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Panic on multiple PRs sharing the same bookmark name

Instead of silently dropping one PR when two share a head_ref_name,
panic with a clear message telling the user which PRs conflict.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Make needs_sync the source of truth for push and base update planning

Steps 4 and 5 of plan_sync now iterate needs_sync directly instead of
all nodes. The Merged PR filter is replaced with assert!, since Merged
nodes should never appear in needs_sync (that's a bug if they do).

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Exclude Merged PRs from needs_sync computation

Merged PR nodes are being abandoned, not synced. They shouldn't be marked
as needing sync (which would show `*` and could theoretically trigger
base updates on frozen GitHub PRs). Their children still get propagated
to via the "has merged parent" check.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Include Closed PRs in sync push and base update actions

Only Merged PRs are excluded (they're being abandoned). Closed PRs are
treated the same as Open — the user may want to re-open them.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix render_show doc comment

Removed "(open PRs only)" since show displays all PR states.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Show PR numbers and bookmark names in sync push action display

Push action now shows e.g. `push: #1 (feat-a), #2 (feat-b)` instead of
just `push 1 bookmark(s)`.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Implement `sync` command

Added jj helpers: `rebase`, `abandon`, `git_push_bookmarks`.

Implemented `plan_sync` and `execute_sync` in pr_dag.rs:
1. Stamp missing trailers (before push, since it changes commit hashes)
2. Rebase children of merged PRs onto trunk() via `jj rebase -s <bookmark>+`
3. Abandon merged PR commits via `jj abandon`
4. Push all open PR bookmarks that need sync (single `jj git push` call)
5. Update GitHub base branches via `gh pr edit --base`

Blocks on conflicted bookmarks. Supports --dry-run and confirmation prompts.
Cleaned up dead commented-out code in main.rs and pr_dag.rs.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add "ambiguous" label to show view, reposition sync indicator

- `show`: now shows `ambiguous* shared between PR #4, PR #5` (added label)
- `log`: `ambiguous* [PR #4, PR #5]` (moved `*` after "ambiguous")
- Both views now consistently place `*` right after the node type label.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Move sync indicator `*` to suffix PR number, add to ambiguous nodes

- `show`: `PR #123*  Draft  bookmark` instead of `PR #123  Draft  bookmark *`
- `show` ambiguous: `shared between PR #1, PR #2*`
- `log`: `PR #123* Draft` instead of `PR #123 Draft *`
- `log` ambiguous: `ambiguous [PR #1, PR #2]*`

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Refactor sync helpers to use NodeKey instead of PrNum, remove pr_node

- Renamed `pr_has_merged_parent` -> `has_merged_parent(nk)`,
  `pr_needs_sync` -> `node_needs_sync(nk)`, `expected_base` now takes `nk`.
- Removed `pr_node: HashMap<PrNum, NodeKey>` from RepoState entirely.
- All callers already have the NodeKey in scope, so the indirection was
  unnecessary. This also means needs_sync works for all node types
  (Ambiguous nodes included), not just PR nodes.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix: populate pr_node map during build()

pr_node was never being written to, so pr_needs_sync always returned false.
Now populated alongside commit_node when a Node::Pr is assigned.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Move topo sort and needs_sync computation into build()

- Added `topo_order: Vec<NodeKey>` to `RepoState`, computed during build
  with panic on cycle (a cycle would be a bug in our logic).
- Added `needs_sync: SparseSecondaryMap<NodeKey, ()>` computed via a single
  forward pass over the topo order, propagating transitively through
  descendants. A node needs sync if it directly needs push/rebase/base-update,
  or any ancestor needs sync.
- `build()` now takes `default_branch: &str` for base mismatch detection.
- Simplified `pr_needs_sync()` to a set lookup.
- Removed `default_branch` parameter from render functions.
- `render_show` now uses stored `topo_order` instead of recomputing.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add sync-status helpers and show `*` for all pending sync actions

Added `gh::default_branch()` to query the GitHub remote's default branch.

Added reusable helper methods on `RepoState`:
- `pr_has_merged_parent()` — checks if any parent PR is merged
- `expected_base()` — derives the correct GitHub base branch from the DAG
- `pr_needs_sync()` — returns true if a PR needs push, rebase, or base update

Updated `render_show` and `render_log` to use `pr_needs_sync` instead of
just `needs_push`, so the `*` indicator now covers all pending sync actions.
Both render functions now accept `default_branch` parameter.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix rendering bugs in show and log views

- Remove duplicate ⚠ from `show` ambiguous node text (already in glyph)
- Fix `]` not getting yellow styling in `log` ambiguous label by styling
  brackets separately from the embedded PR num strings (which have their
  own ANSI reset sequences)

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Show context-sensitive hints for ambiguous nodes in `show` view

Instead of always showing "restructure PRs to resolve", the hint now
depends on what's actually wrong:
- Shared commits (multiple branch PRs): suggest restructuring
- Wrong trailer (trailer PRs differ from branch PRs): suggest editing trailers
- Both: mention both fixes
- Neither (edge case): generic hint

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Panic on impossible ambiguous node case

Replace the generic fallback hint with a panic for the (false, false)
case — no shared commits and no trailer mismatch should not produce an
Ambiguous node.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix bug in decide_combine_child_nodes: break -> continue

The first iteration of the child node merge loop was breaking immediately
after setting the initial value, making the merge logic for subsequent
children dead code. Changed to `continue` so all child nodes are properly
merged together.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
add bookmarks_conflicted

Show * indicator for PRs that need pushing in show and log views

PRs in needs_push set display " *" after the bookmark name in both
the show (PR-level) and log (commit-level) views.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add needs_push: HashSet<PrNum> to RepoState

Computed in build() by comparing local vs remote bookmark targets
for each PR. A PR is in the set when its local bookmark points to
a different commit than the remote bookmark. Used by sync for push
detection and by show/log for displaying push indicators.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Render Node::Ambiguous properly in show view

Ambiguous nodes now display:
- Warning glyph ⚠ in yellow
- "shared between PR #1, PR #2" with clickable PR links
- Trailer info if present: "(trailer: PR #1)"
- Hint: "(restructure PRs to resolve — stack one on the other)"

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Extract glyphs and labels to style consts, add green trunk/root styling

- Added GLYPH_IMMUTABLE, GLYPH_MUTABLE, GLYPH_WARNING consts
- Added LABEL_TRUNK, LABEL_ROOT consts
- Added TRUNK_LABEL style (bold green, matching jj's root() color)
- Added style::trunk() and style::root() helpers
- Replaced all inline glyph/label strings in pr_dag.rs

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
add root() separate from trunk()

Rename Node::Trunk to Node::Root, trunk_node to root_node

Root represents the synthetic "everything before trunk" boundary.
TrunkTip (to be added) will represent the actual trunk() commit.
Updated all references, display labels show "root()" instead of
"trunk()". Tests are out of date from the broader refactor.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Make `show` the default subcommand

Running `jj-pr` with no subcommand now defaults to `show`.
Uses `Option<Command>` with `unwrap_or(Command::Show(...))`.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Use tuple variants with arg structs for all subcommands

All Command variants now use tuple fields with dedicated arg structs:
ShowArgs, LogArgs, SyncArgs, TrackArgs, TidyArgs. This makes it
cleaner to pass the full struct to handler functions as we add more
args. Added `s` alias for `show`.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Rename log -> show, log-changes -> log

- `show` (alias `s`): PR-level DAG view
- `log`: commit-level view with PR annotations
- Renamed render functions: render_show, render_log

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
trunk -> trunk()

Add is_trunk_tip field to JjLogEntry

Added `is_trunk_tip: bool` to JjLogEntry, computed via
`self.contained_in("trunk()")` in the jj template. This identifies
the exact trunk tip commit, distinguishing "properly rebased on
latest trunk" from "behind trunk, needs rebase".

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
cleanup jj change view

Improve log-changes: jj-like styling and trunk node

- Added jj-like colors: change_id in bold magenta, commit_id in blue,
  bookmarks in bold magenta, descriptions styled, empty commits marked
- Each row shows: change_id, commit_id, bookmarks, PR info, then
  description on second line
- Added trunk ◆ node at bottom of graph using CommitId::ref_cast
- Trunk case in jj entry loop is unreachable (trunk not in jj entries)
- Added style helpers: commit_id_short, description_first_line,
  bookmark_label, empty_marker, dim

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
cleanups, add log-changes
pull out functions, format

Add confirmation prompts to sync, import, and track create

- sync: "Apply N action(s)?" before pushing bookmarks / updating bases
- import: "Stamp N commit(s) across M PR(s)?" before writing trailers
- track create: "Create draft PR?" before calling gh pr create
- All prompts skipped with -y/--yes global flag

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
PR: #4

Make y/yes confirmation case-insensitive

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
PR: #4

Add -y/--yes global flag and confirmation prompt for reclaiming

New `ui` module with `confirm(message, auto_yes)` helper that prompts
`[y/N]` on stderr, or auto-proceeds with `-y`.

Global `-y`/`--yes` flag on the CLI, threaded through to `track_pr`
and `find_pr_commits`. When reclaiming commits from another PR, the
user is prompted to confirm before overwriting trailers. With `-y`,
the action is noted but proceeds without waiting.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
PR: #4

Resolve conflict: merge reclaim fix with y/n confirmation changes

Merged the "only reclaim when tip is foreign-stamped" fix (using
own_commits.is_empty()) with the y/n confirmation prompt changes
(separate own_commits/reclaimed_commits, yes parameter, ui::confirm).
Fixed unicode arrow escape that got mangled during conflict resolution.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix reclaim mode: only activate when tip is foreign-stamped

Reclaim mode now only activates when the very first commits encountered
are stamped by a foreign PR (result is empty). If we've already claimed
unstamped commits, hitting a foreign trailer is a normal boundary stop.
This prevents incorrect reclaiming when creating a child PR that
naturally stops at the parent's commits.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
PR: #7
log working, single compute step

Add comment about orphaned nodes from Node::combine

Added a NOTE comment at the combine site (pass 1 membership) explaining
that intermediate combined nodes can become orphaned in the slotmap
when 3+ PRs converge. Bounded by number of ambiguous merge points.

No logic changes. render_log filtering deferred for further design.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
jj log working
normalize wip

Update design doc: trailers are primary for merged PRs

Trailers now have two roles:
1. Validation (when bookmarks exist) - graph is primary
2. Recovery (when bookmarks deleted after merge) - trailers are primary

Updated Trailers section with detailed explanation of the merged PR
scenario. Updated RepoState principles to reflect dual membership
sources.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
wip fix graph alg

Fix render_log topo sort: collapse non-displayed predecessors to Trunk

The topo sort in render_log was panicking because it filtered to only
open PRs + ambig + trunk, but the preds closure returned all
predecessors including merged PRs not in the display set.

Fix: build a set of displayed nodes, and in the preds closure, map
any predecessor not in the display set to DagNode::Trunk. This
correctly collapses merged parent PRs to trunk in the graph view.

Note: 13 tests still failing due to the broader hand-typed algorithm
refactor (new JjState/DagNode types), not this fix.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
hand-typed graph algorithm
ignore .infinity

Add inline comments to build() top-level variables, use mut+freeze pattern

Each computed variable in build() now has a comment describing its
type and purpose. Replaced block-scoped tuple returns with mut
variables followed by `let x = x;` to freeze them. No renamed
inner variables.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Refactor build() with block-scoped sections

Restructured build() into clearly scoped phases using
`let (a, b) = { ...; (a, b) }` pattern:

- Phase 1: Index inputs (gh_by_head, bookmark_to_entry, targets)
- Phase 2: Compute ancestor reachability (ancestor_of)
- Phase 3: Compute membership and parent PRs
- Phase 4: Diagnostics (diverged, merged, push, base, trailers)

Each phase's intermediate variables are scoped to their block.
No logic changes. All 27 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Document build() postconditions

Added detailed doc comment listing postconditions for each field of
RepoState: prs, by_bookmark, commit_membership, parent_prs, and
diagnostics. Specifies ownership rules, parent detection criteria,
and which diagnostics are emitted under what conditions.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix parent detection for merge children, improve UpdateBase display

Fix: when a commit is shared with another bookmark, only treat that
bookmark as a parent if its tip is an ancestor of our tip (it's below
us). Previously, merge children were incorrectly treated as parents
because their commits are ancestors of the merge bookmark.

Added bookmark name to UpdateBase action for clearer display:
"update PR #2810 (mingwei/delete-metrics-slotvec) base -> ..."

Added test for merge-child scenario (PR #3 merges #1 and #2).
All 27 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Fix: treat parents not in state as trunk (beyond revset boundary)

When a commit's parent is not in the JjState entries (beyond the
revset boundary), treat it as a trunk parent. Previously the walk
silently stopped without recording a trunk parent, causing PRs to
appear as having no parents.

Added 2 tests: single PR and stacked PRs with parent not in state.
All 26 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
hydro.jj, .gh

Handle diverged bookmarks: diagnostic, sync refusal, null targets

- Fix deserialization: bookmark `target` is now `Vec<Option<String>>`
  to handle jj's null entries for conflicted/deleted bookmark sides
- Detect diverged bookmarks (target.len() > 1) in build(), emit
  `BookmarkDiverged` diagnostic, skip them from PR processing
- `plan_sync` refuses with clear error listing diverged bookmarks
- Added 2 tests: diagnostic detection and sync refusal
- All 24 tests pass, clippy clean

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Replace design doc and README for v2

Deleted old DESIGN.md (v1), renamed DESIGN_V2.md to DESIGN.md.
Cleaned up: removed v1/v2 framing, implementation plan (done),
updated parent_prs to use Option<PrId>, streamlined sections.

Updated README.md to reflect v2: graph-primary membership, new
command set (log/sync/track/tidy), diagnostic-driven actions,
updated project structure and key types.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Step 4: Add track, tidy commands and CLI restructuring

- CLI: added `track` (create/update PR), `tidy` (repair trailers),
  global `-y`/`--yes` flag
- `track_pr`: resolves bookmark/revision, sets bookmark, pushes,
  creates GH PR or updates, stamps trailers from graph membership
- `plan_tidy`/`execute_tidy`: converts TrailerMismatch and
  OrphanedTrailer diagnostics into fix/remove actions
- `ui` module with `confirm()` helper (default yes [Y/n])
- `sync` and `tidy` prompt before applying actions
- Added `jj::remove_pr_trailer`, `jj::resolve_revision`,
  `jj::read_description` helpers
- Removed old `import` command
- All 22 tests pass, clippy clean

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Replace has_trunk_parent with Option<PrId> in parent_prs

parent_prs is now `BTreeMap<PrId, Vec<Option<PrId>>>` where `None`
represents a trunk parent. Removed the separate `has_trunk_parent`
map. Expected base computation uses `if let [Some(parent_id)] = parents`
pattern matching. All 22 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

v2: Rewrite RepoState with graph-primary membership and PrId

Major refactor implementing the v2 design:

- PrId newtype wrapping NonZeroU64 for type-safe PR references
- RepoState with normalized top-level maps: prs (GhPr metadata),
  commit_membership (change_id -> PrId), parent_prs, has_trunk_parent
- Graph-based membership: walk from each bookmark, exclude ancestors
  of other bookmarks + trunk (revset-style algorithm in Rust)
- No raw JjState/GhPr stored on RepoState
- Full diagnostic system: NeedsPush, BaseRefMismatch, ParentMerged,
  MissingTrailer, TrailerMismatch, OrphanedTrailer, UnownedCommit
- plan_sync is pure diagnostic -> action mapping
- sync refuses if TrailerMismatch/OrphanedTrailer exist (needs tidy)
- Removed PrNode, track, import commands (to be re-added)
- 22 tests: membership (single, stacked, diamond), parent detection,
  sync (no-op, push, base update, merged parent), trailer diagnostics
  (missing, mismatch, orphaned), sync-refuses-on-conflict

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add architectural invariants to v2 design doc

- RepoState is immutable once built, no incremental updates
- Descriptions read at mutation time via CLI, not stored in RepoState
- Keeps RepoState as a pure planning structure

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Update v2 design doc with implementation notes

- Revset algorithm is spec only; implementation computes in Rust
- Unowned commits rendered as warning nodes in `log` graph
- `MissingTrailer` moved to sync (happy path, not repair)
- `sync` only fails on TrailerMismatch/OrphanedTrailer
- `tidy` prompts [Y/n] per PR, not per commit
- Diagnostic table updated with command ownership

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Update v2 design doc: RepoState restructure and implementation plan

- RepoState uses normalized top-level maps instead of per-node graph data
- GhPr used directly instead of separate PrNode/PrInfo
- PrId newtype (NonZeroU64) for type safety
- build() consumes raw data, no raw fields stored
- 6-step implementation plan: PrId + restructure, graph membership,
  trailer diagnostics, CLI restructuring, prompts, tests

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Update v2 design doc: CLI restructuring and confirmation prompts

- `sync`: push + GH base updates + rebase merged children. Fails if
  trailer issues exist (must `tidy` first).
- `tidy`: new command for trailer repair (stamp/fix/remove). Replaces
  `import`.
- `track`: create/update PR + stamp trailers (unchanged).
- `import`: removed, replaced by `tidy`.
- All destructive actions prompt [Y/n] (default yes). Global -y flag.
- Diagnostic table updated with command ownership and prompt markers.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Tighten v2 design doc: precise membership algorithm with revset

Replaced informal "walk ancestors" description with concrete algorithm:
compute each PR's owned range as `ancestors(bookmark) & ~ancestors(other_bookmarks | trunk())`.
No circularity -- bookmark positions are fixed inputs.

Added examples for simple stack, diamond (unowned commits), and stacked
shared ancestor. Clarified that step 4 (unowned) is the common invalid
case, not step 5 (ambiguous). Renamed AmbiguousCommit to UnownedCommit
in the diagnostic table.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add v2 design doc: graph-primary PR membership

New design document describing the shift from trailer-primary to
graph-primary membership computation. Trailers become a secondary
safety net for validation and recovery. Includes rules for ambiguous
cases, diagnostic-driven actions, and command changes.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Unify all sync state into diagnostics, remove computed fields

Removed `needs_push` and `expected_base` from `PrNode`. All sync-relevant
state is now represented as diagnostics:

- `NeedsPush { pr_number, bookmark }` — local ≠ remote bookmark target
- `BaseRefMismatch { pr_number, expected, actual }` — GH base ≠ DAG base
- `ParentMerged { merged_pr, bookmark, child_prs }` — merged PR needs rebase

`BaseRefMismatch` is suppressed for PRs that have a `ParentMerged`
diagnostic (the merge is the root cause, not the base mismatch).

`plan_sync` is now a pure diagnostic→action mapper with no logic.
`ParentMerged` emits both `Rebase` and `UpdateBase` for child PRs.

All 23 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Rename PrDag to RepoState

Better reflects that it's the unified world view containing jj state,
GitHub PRs, the PR graph, and diagnostics — not just a DAG.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Step 3: Unify all commands behind PrDag as single world view

`PrDag` now owns `JjState` and `Vec<GhPr>`. `build()` takes ownership
of both. All commands take only `&PrDag` (plus user args for track):

- `render_log(&PrDag)`
- `plan_sync(&PrDag)`
- `track_pr(&PrDag, &TrackArgs)`
- `plan_import(&PrDag)` / `import_prs(&PrDag, dry_run)`

No command takes raw `JjState` or `Vec<GhPr>` as separate parameters.
Functions that need them access `dag.jj_state` and `dag.gh_prs`.

All 23 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Step 2: Move expected base branch into PrNode, plan_sync takes only &PrDag

Added `expected_base` field to `PrNode`, computed in `build()` after
all nodes are constructed. `plan_sync` now compares `node.base_ref`
vs `node.expected_base` directly — no longer needs `gh_prs` parameter.

Removed `compute_expected_base` function. Cleaned up dead_code expects
for `base_ref` and `commit_ids` which are now used. `plan_sync` signature
is now `plan_sync(&PrDag) -> Result<Vec<SyncAction>>`.

All 23 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Step 1: Move bookmark push detection into PrDag

Added `needs_push` field to `PrNode`, computed during `build()` by
comparing local vs remote bookmark targets. `plan_sync` no longer
takes `JjState` — it reads `node.needs_push` directly from the DAG.

`plan_sync` now also filters to open PRs only when checking push/base
state. All 23 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add diagnostics to PrDag, detect merged parent PRs needing rebase

- Add `Diagnostic` enum and `diagnostics` field to `PrDag`
- `build()` now includes merged PRs in the DAG (not just open)
- Detects `ParentMerged` diagnostic when a merged PR has mutable
  children outside the PR
- `plan_sync` converts `ParentMerged` into `SyncAction::Rebase` with
  the merged PR's bookmark (for `jj rebase -s "bookmark+" -d trunk()`)
- `compute_expected_base` treats merged parent PRs as trunk (base=main)
- `render_log` filters to open PRs only
- New test `sync_detects_merged_parent_needs_rebase` passes
- All 23 tests pass

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

Add failing test for merged parent PR rebase detection

Test verifies that when a parent PR is merged (squash into trunk),
sync should produce a Rebase action for the direct child change
(not the PR) onto trunk(), plus an UpdateBase to main.

Added SyncAction::Rebase variant with source_change and destination
fields. Test currently fails as plan_sync doesn't detect merged PRs.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

feat: handle out-of-order PR creation with mode-based trailer walk (#3)

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>

feat: handle out-of-order PR creation with mode-based trailer walk

find_pr_commits now uses a reclaim mode: when it hits commits stamped
by a different PR X, it reclaims them (overwrites with current PR),
but stops at any other PR Y boundary. This handles the case where a
child PR is created before its parent — the parent reclaims its
commits from the child without over-claiming into other PRs.

Removed the re-import approach in favor of this self-contained logic.

Co-authored-by: Infinity 🤖 <infinity@hydro.run>
